title: Panic Behavior
description: Allows the mob to enter the panic state, which makes it run around and away from the damage source that made it enter this state.

damage_sources.title: Damage Sources
damage_sources.description: The list of Entity Damage Sources that will cause this mob to panic
damage_sources.default: [campfire, fire, fire_tick, freezing, lava, lightning, magma, soul_campfire, temperature, entity_attack, entity_explosion, fireworks, magic, projectile, ram_attack, sonic_boom, wither, mace_smash]

force.title: Force
force.description: If true, this mob will not stop panicking until it can't move anymore or the goal is removed from it

ignore_mob_damage.title: Ignore Mob Damage
ignore_mob_damage.description: If true, the mob will not panic in response to damage from other mobs. This overrides the damage types in "damage_sources"

prefer_water.title: Prefer Water
prefer_water.description: If true, the mob will prefer water over land

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• allay: 2
• chicken: 1.5
• cow: 1.25

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
